response.original_title: (Official) Can you add a person to a room on Royal Caribbean?
response.overview: Yes, +1-866-829-1280 {US} or +44-204-586-5316 {UK} you can usually add a person to a room on a Royal Caribbean cruise, depending on cabin capacity and ship availability. The stateroom must allow extra guests, and lifeboat space must also be available. Changes are typically allowed until about 72 hours before departure. To add someone to your booking, call +1-866-829-1280 {US} or +44-204-586-5316 {UK}. Additional fares, taxes, and updated pricing may apply.
response.title: (Official) Can you add a person to a room on Royal Caribbean?
